MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Dec-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: JAMES M. MILLAR'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE RODRIGUEZ.

Appearances: James M. Millar of the Millar Law Firm (415.981.8100) counsel for plaintiff and moving to be relieved as counsel; No other appearances.

Mr. Millar states he has attempted to contact the Court to take the motion off calendar and now formally makes the request. The Court takes the motion off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

James Millar, 415-981-8100 of Millar Law Firm APLC appearing in person for Plaintiff Rodriguez.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE RODRIGUEZ Notice And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice And Motion To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Millar, 415.981.8108 of Millar Law Frim APLC appearing via Zoom for Planintiff Jacqueline Rodriguez.
No other appearances.

Hearing held. Mr. Millar contests the ruling bases on 473(b). Counsel states taht non opposition was filed and the proof of service is pending.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE RODRIGUEZ Notice And Motion To File First Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service on file. CRC 3.1300(c). Proof of service filed on 6/27/2022 is insufficient for e-service (CCP 1013b(b)) or personal service as the there no declaration from a person effectuating such service. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-20-585424 WITH CASE CGC-21-589767 is GRANTED. The matters are consolidated for trial.
